summary: Vertical video with captions/subtitles. ICE Director Todd Lyons speaks a weekly operations recap (Boston operation, 370 arrests, meth and fentanyl seizures), with a brief inserted detainee photo and follow-button overlays. He speaks directly to camera; there is no music track.
notable_text: to a very successful operation; we seized 44 kilograms of meth; SEE THE FULL VIDEO ON FACEBOOK & YOUTUBE; Please don't listen; the public safety threats; follow @ICEgov
